description: chat4n6 report regenerates HTML from carve-results.json without re-extracting
steps: Run 'chat4n6 run' to produce carve-results.json in output dir
Assert new output dir contains index.html
Assert the report is identical in structure to the run-generated one

description: --page-size flag controls messages per HTML page (default 500)
steps: Run 'chat4n6 run ... --page-size 2' on a fixture with 5 messages in one chat
Assert output contains at least 3 page files (page_001.html, page_002.html, page_003.html)
